name: LanguageWire
description: LanguageWire — Enterprise translation management platform combining human translators with AI and TMS workflow.

seo.title: LanguageWire — Localization / Translation API
seo.meta_description: LanguageWire: LanguageWire — Enterprise translation management platform combining human translators with AI and TMS workflow.

when_to_use: Enterprise TMS with human + AI translation workflow
Localization project management API for content teams
AI post-editing workflow for high-volume translation
API-driven translation for CMS content localization

pros: Human translators plus AI inside one TMS workflow
Enterprise governance, SSO, and audit trails
Connectors for CMS, PIM, and marketing stacks
Dedicated project managers for complex programs
cons: Enterprise pricing, opaque until sales call
Overkill for small dev teams doing string localization
Onboarding and integration setup takes weeks
API is secondary to the managed-service model
review.verdict: Solid pick for regulated enterprises that want humans-in-the-loop, not for indie devs looking for a cheap API.
review.best_for: Large European enterprises with mixed human and AI translation needs
review.not_for: Startups or devs who just want a pay-as-you-go translation API
